title: GitBook Organization
description: An organization in GitBook that groups users, spaces, and collections under a shared account with roles and permissions.

id.description: The unique identifier of the organization.

title.description: The display name of the organization.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the organization was created.

updatedAt.description: The timestamp when the organization was last updated.

app.description: URL to the organization in the GitBook app.

published.description: URL to the organization's published site.
